overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a white fur cloak running along a cobblestone mountain path at night toward Stormveil Castle. The environment features autumn foliage, ancient stone ruins, floating red particles in the sky, and a bright comet that appears overhead as the character approaches a fog gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain path approaching castle with glowing tree

agents.ego_description: character runs steadily along the stone path toward the distant castle, passing the glowing golden tree

entered.detail: massive dark stone fortress with multiple towers visible in the distance ahead
tall tree with bright golden-yellow glowing branches illuminating the area
ancient cobblestone road with moss between the stones
trees with orange and red autumn leaves lining both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a cobblestone mountain path at night toward the massive Stormveil Castle in the distance. A glowing golden tree stands prominently on the right side while autumn foliage lines the path. At six seconds, the location name 'Stormhill' appears on screen.

events.description: bright comet with trailing light appears in the night sky

agents.ego_description: character continues running forward as stone ruins begin appearing on the sides of the path

entered.detail: ancient crumbling stone walls and archways flanking the path
bright white comet with long luminous tail streaking across the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a section of ancient stone ruins with walls flanking the cobblestone path. The Stormveil Castle shifts to the left as the path curves. The golden tree disappears behind, and a brilliant comet suddenly appears in the sky around the 22-second mark, trailing light across the darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined stone corridor with comet overhead

agents.ego_description: character runs through the narrow ruined passage with the bright comet shining overhead

entered.detail: tall vertical stone columns remnants of ancient structures
rock outcrops and boulders alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Running through a narrower section enclosed by stone ruins and pillars, the character moves deeper into the ancient site. The autumn trees fall behind, and the comet moves across the sky from center to right, growing brighter. The castle disappears behind as the path winds through the rocky terrain.

events.description: path leads into a thick foggy mist area ahead

agents.ego_description: character approaches the foggy mist at the end of the path while the comet shines brightly to the right

entered.detail: thick white fog gate blocking the path ahead, glowing faintly

segments.scene_description: The path opens up again as the character approaches a thick fog gate blocking the way forward. The stone ruins fall behind, and the bright comet dominates the right side of the sky. The fog grows denser as the character runs toward it, marking a transition point in the environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nocturnal mountain path that transitions from an open vista of a distant fortress into a claustrophobic approach toward a mystical barrier. It begins with the character running along a cobblestone road lined with autumn foliage, with a massive castle and a glowing golden tree dominating the horizon. As the path curves, the scene shifts through ancient stone ruins that flank the way, causing the golden tree to vanish while a brilliant comet suddenly streaks across the dark sky. The camera then moves deeper into a narrow corridor of pillars and rocky terrain, leaving the castle behind as the comet grows brighter and drifts toward the right. Finally, the ruins open up once more as the character charges toward a dense, looming fog gate that blocks the path under the light of the dominating comet.
